title: judge-standard matrix: authoring advisory + behavior-class cap teeth (D3)
action: Per D3 (+Δ4/Δ5/F4/F5 folded in CONTEXT Validating amendments): FREEZE FIRST. change_class enum validation (absent + behavior_change:true derives behavior). F4: advisories emit on STDERR via the bee.mjs handler layer (pah-2 emitManifestLintWarnings precedent) — JUDGE_STANDARD_INSUFFICIENT naming the missing minimum per the CONTEXT matrix; NEVER folded into the JSON result, NEVER a refusal at authoring. Cap teeth ONLY for behavior class riding the red_failure_evidence door: refuse when absent, <80 chars, or sha256(trimmed) equals another cells recorded red evidence — Δ5: tolerant-parse the sibling scan (skip unparseable files, never throw), compare only entries >=80 chars, refusal names the colliding cell id. F5: a behavior cell riding deliberate_exceptions keeps todays contract, with a STDERR advisory noting it. Tests: per-class warning rows (stderr captured), behavior cap-refusal rows (absent/short/duplicate) + green row + deliberate_exceptions passthrough row, corrupt-sibling tolerance row. Δ4: verify also runs test_claim_race (cap touches claim-clearing surface). Regen inside cell: mirror + render + manifest.

truths: authoring never hard-refuses on the matrix
only the behavior class has cap teeth in v1
refusals name the missing minimum verbatim
artifacts: matrix test rows green + deliberate-red recorded
prohibitions: no changes to existing cap evidence requirements beyond the behavior teeth

verify: node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: D3 judge-standard matrix shipped: optional change_class enum (formatting|bugfix|behavior|api|security|migration), absent+behavior_change:true derives behavior (no other auto-derivation). Advisory JUDGE_STANDARD_INSUFFICIENT warning at cells add/update (STDERR only via bee.mjs handler layer, pah-2 precedent) naming the missing per-class minimum, never a refusal. Mechanical cap teeth ONLY for behavior class: capCell refuses when verification_evidence.red_failure_evidence is absent, <80 chars, or sha256(trimmed) collides with another cell's recorded evidence (tolerant sibling scan via listCells, never throws on corrupt files) — refusal names the colliding cell id. Gated on the derived/explicit change_class, independent of the behavior_change flag. F5: a behavior cell riding deliberate_exceptions keeps today's contract untouched (no length/duplicate floor), with its own STDERR advisory at cap time. Fixed 4 pre-existing test fixtures whose short/duplicate red_failure_evidence would have newly tripped the teeth. 21 new test rows across test_lib.mjs (11: deriveChangeClass, enum validation, missing/short/duplicate/green/exception/corrupt-sibling/non-behavior cap rows) and test_bee_cli.mjs (11: judgeStandardWarning pure-logic + malformed-shape tolerance, CLI end-to-end F4/F5 stderr rows). Deliberate-red proof: disabled the cap-teeth gate, confirmed exactly the 3 refusal-row tests failed plus the mirror-parity check, then restored to green.
